# spawnly_schema (Data Source)

The registry's active SpiceDB authorization schema.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `schema` (String) The full SpiceDB schema text the registry is currently serving.
- `source` (String) Where the active schema was loaded from.
- `version` (String) Version identifier of the active schema.
